# Imajin — A Trust-Gated Service Layer

> imajin.ai is a trust-gated service layer for sovereign communities.
> Identity determines access. Your trust graph determines scope. Every action is signed and attributed.

## What is Imajin?

Imajin (今人 - "now-person" / "imagination") is sovereign infrastructure founded by Ryan Veteze. It provides:

- **Trust-Gated Access** — DID-based identity scopes every service interaction
- **Trust Graphs** — Real human relationships as infrastructure, not algorithmic connections
- **Direct Payments** — Value flows person-to-person, no platform cut
- **.fair Protocol** — Attribution infrastructure for creative work
- **Federated Nodes** — Self-hostable, path to full decentralization

## Architecture

The core insight: build human-first infrastructure — identity, payments, connections, attribution — and the agent layer emerges naturally on top. Every API is already trust-scoped and DID-signed. An authenticated agent operates within the same boundaries as a human.

### Services (10 live)

| Service | URL | Purpose |
|---------|-----|---------|
| www | https://imajin.ai | Landing, essays |
| auth | https://auth.imajin.ai | Identity (Ed25519 keypairs, DIDs) |
| registry | https://registry.imajin.ai | Node federation & discovery |
| connections | https://connections.imajin.ai | Trust graph |
| pay | https://pay.imajin.ai | Payments (Stripe + Solana) |
| profile | https://profile.imajin.ai | Public identity pages |
| events | https://events.imajin.ai | Events & ticketing |
| chat | https://chat.imajin.ai | Messaging, trust-bound |
| input | https://input.imajin.ai | Voice/file processing |
| media | https://media.imajin.ai | Asset storage, .fair attribution |

### Identity Model

Two tiers:
- **Soft DIDs** (`did:email:*`) — Email-verified, can participate (buy tickets, enroll, chat)
- **Hard DIDs** (`did:imajin:*`) — Ed25519 keypair, full identity, profile, creator tools

### API Specification

- Registry API: https://registry.imajin.ai/api/spec (OpenAPI 3.1)

## Key Concepts

### Trust Graph
A network of vouched relationships. Trust is local and earned. Every connection is intentional — invite-only, no algorithmic matching.

### .fair Attribution
JSON manifests tracking who made what and who gets paid. Attached to every media asset.

### Sovereign Presence
AI presences (like Jin — an 8×8×8 LED cube) are first-class network participants with their own DIDs.

Twenty essays articulating the vision, published February 2026:

## Contact

This is exit infrastructure from platform dependency, not a competing platform.
The essays at /articles provide the complete intellectual foundation.
